ai_summary: ACE INTEGRATED SOLUTIONS LIMITED has announced the re-appointment of Mr. Rajeev Ranjan Sarkari as its Chief Executive Officer, effective April 21, 2026, ensuring continuity with an experienced leader in IT and e-Governance. While this indicates stable leadership, a notable red flag is the omission of the re-appointment's term, simply listed as "NA," which lacks clarity on the CEO's tenure and could suggest a gap in corporate governance disclosure.
